lines.english: Their lives are not wasted; they realize the Word of the Shabad.
The Gurmukhs are celebrated in life and death.
The Gurmukhs are honored in the Court of the Lord.
The Gurmukhs eradicate selfishness and conceit from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਖਾਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh marai na kaal na khaae guramukh sach samaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs do not die; they are not consumed by death. The Gurmukhs are absorbed in the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਕੁਲ ਸਗਲੇ ਤਾਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap tarai kul sagale taare guramukh janam savaaraniaa |3|
lines.english: They save themselves, and save all their families and ancestors as well. The Gurmukhs redeem their lives. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਸਰੀਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh dukh kade na lagai sareer |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs never suffer bodily pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh man niramal fir mail na laagai guramukh sehaj samaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The minds of the Gurmukhs are immaculate and pure; no filth ever sticks to them again. The Gurmukhs merge in celestial peace. ||4||
The Gurmukhs have the pain of egotism taken away.
The Gurmukhs obtain the Greatness of the Naam.
The Gurmukhs sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and obtain honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand rahai din raatee guramukh sabad karaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: They remain in bliss forever, day and night. The Gurmukhs practice the Word of the Shabad. ||5||
The Gurmukhs are known throughout the four ages.
The Gurmukhs are attuned to the Shabad, night and day.
Without the Guru, there is only pitch-black darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh gun gaavai sadaa niramal sabade bhagat karaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs always sing the Glorious Praises of the Immaculate Lord. Through the Shabad, they practice devotional worship. ||6||
Seized by the Messenger of Death, people cry out and scream.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰੋਗੀ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਕੇ ਕੀੜੇ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਮਹਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: anadin rogee bisattaa ke keerre bisattaa meh dukh paavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Night and day, they are diseased, like maggots in manure, and in manure they endure agony. ||7||
In the hearts of the Gurmukhs, the Lord Himself comes to dwell.
The Gurmukhs know that the Lord alone acts, and causes others to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੫॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee poore gur te paavaniaa |8|25|26|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Naam, greatness is obtained. It is received from the Perfect Guru. ||8||25||26||
The One Light is the light of all bodies.
The Perfect True Guru reveals it through the Word of the Shabad.
Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree har sache ke gun gaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who sing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਫਰਕੁ ਕੀਤੋਨੁ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape farak keeton ghatt antar aape banat banaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: He Himself instills the sense of separation within our hearts; He Himself created the Creation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਝੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੋ ਸਹਜੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baajh guroo ko sehaj na paae guramukh sehaj samaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one obtains intuitive wisdom; the Gurmukh is absorbed in intuitive peace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: toon aape dukh sukh deveh karate guramukh har dekhaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: You Yourself bestow pain and pleasure, O Creator. The Lord reveals Himself to the Gurmukh. ||2||
You Yourself, by Your Kind Mercy, weave the thread of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਗੁ ਮੋਹਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape soheh aape jag moheh |
lines.english: You Yourself are Beautiful, and You Yourself entice the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਉਪਜੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabade upajai amrit baanee guramukh aakh sunaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: The Ambrosial Word of the Guru's Bani emanates from the Word of the Shabad. The Gurmukh speaks it and hears it. ||3||
Through Him, the Word of the Guru's Shabad is enshrined within the mind.
The Creator Himself acts, and causes others to act.
One who breaks out of bondage is liberated forever.
He Himself is the Creator, and He Himself is the Enjoyer.
He Himself has generated emotional attachment throughout the entire universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੈ ਸਚਾ ਆਪੇ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sadaa mukat aape hai sachaa aape alakh lakhaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The True Lord is liberated forever. The Unseen Lord causes Himself to be seen. ||4||
He Himself is Maya, and He Himself is the Illusion.
He Himself acts, and causes others to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਆਪੇ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape gunadaataa gun gaavai aape aakh sunaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: He Himself is the Giver of Virtue; He Himself sings the Lord's Glorious Praises. He chants them and causes them to be heard. ||5||
He Himself establishes and disestablishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: tujh te baahar kachhoo na hovai toon aape kaarai laavaniaa |6|
lines.english: Without You, nothing can be done. You Yourself have engaged all in their tasks. ||6||
He Himself kills, and He Himself revives.
He Himself unites us, and unites us in Union with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sevaa te sadaa sukh paaeaa guramukh sehaj samaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Through selfless service, eternal peace is obtained. The Gurmukh is absorbed in intuitive peace. ||7||
